title: Accessible Pagination

statement.markdown:
# Accessible Pagination Challenge

### Requirements numbered list
1. The pagination should be accessible by screen readers.
2. The pagination should be usable on small screens.
3. The pagination should be styled consistently with the provided example.
4. The pagination should be implemented using JavaScript, HTML and CSS.
5. The code should be concise and efficient.
text: Implement an accessible pagination system with next and previous buttons and numbered pages.

constraints: The pagination should be accessible by screen readers
The pagination should be usable on small screens
The pagination should be styled consistently with the provided example
The pagination should be implemented using JavaScript, HTML and CSS
The code should be concise and efficient

gradingCriteria.description: The pagination is accessible by screen readers
The pagination is usable on small screens
The pagination is styled consistently with the provided example
The pagination is implemented using JavaScript, HTML and CSS
The code is concise and efficient
